language.name: Crow
play_on_vanilla.msg: Crow crow crow. Crow, crow crow crow.jar. Crow crow crow, crow crow crow/crow/crow. Crow, crow crow crow.
ritual: > Caw Cawe Crawd caw. Caw. Crawd caw.
grimsbane_arrives: » Cawscaw caw Cawford! Caw caw! Caw caw caw!!
lumberjack.d: Caw? Caw caw. Caw caw caw?
lumberjack.2: Crow crow! Crow, crow crow caw.
bum.d: Crow crow caw crow, crow crow! Crow, crow crow crow crow.
bum.n: Caw caw caw Caw caw caw, caw?
fisher.n: Crow, crow, crow. Crow crow crow...
fisher.1.1: Crow, crow! Crow, crow crow crow crow caw crow?
fisher.1.2: Caw. Crow, crow. Crow crow caw!
priest.1: Caw? Crow crow? Caw! Caw cawy caw! Caw crow caw crow crow crow!
priest.2: Crow crow crow! Crow crow caw!
priest.2.1: Crow, crow crow. Crow! Crow crow!
priest.a3: Crow Cawy Caw crow Cawy Crow
richard.d: Crow crow? Crow crow caws crow croak crow. Crow crow crow?
richard.n: Crow crow crow? Crow crow caws crow croak crow. Crow crow crow?
richard.1: Crow crow. Crow crow, crow crow.
richard.2: Crow caw! Crow crow crow crow!
miner.d.1: Crow crow, crow crow. Crow crow, crow crow crow. Crow crowy crowed crow caw crow?
miner.n.1: Crow crow crow. Crow, crow crow, crow! Crow crow crowy crowed crow crow caw?
miner.n2.1: Crow crow crow, crow crow. Crow crow crow. Crow.
miner.a1: Crow Crowy Crowed Crow crow Crow Crow
miner.1x: Crow crow! Crow crow crow. Crow crow crow crow crow!
miner.2: Crow. Crow crow crow, crow crow. Crow caw... crow crow crow crow crow. Crow crow crow crow crow, crow crow.
girl.d: Oh, hello. I found a weird skull in this creepy place. Now I'm really hungry. Do you have some spare crow by any chance?
girl.n: Ahh! You scared me. What are you doing out so late? Do you have any crow? I've been here for hours!
girl.1x: It's too hot! I don't like Crowy Crowed Crow. Do you have some older bread on you by any chance?
druid.a1: Trade Skeleton Skull for Fermented Spider Eye
druid.1: I was trying to summon a , but I got a fermented spider eye instead. Take it, I was about to get rid of it anyway...
druid.2: Blood would be better, but I guess redstone works. Take this string as a reward!
witch.d: You... why do you keep coming to me? I am not here just to cure your sick people! And now I couldn't even be able to do that because my cauldron broke!
witch.a1: Trade Fermented Spider Eye for Diamond Pickaxe
witch.2: A... cauldron. For me? I... you can have those potions...
witch.3: You... I don't just enchant everyone's armor! But I guess I haven't had a nice pumpkin pie in a while... bring me a pumpkin pie!
witch.a3.1: Give Chainmail Helmet and Pumpkin Pie
brewer.a1: Trade Blaze Powder for Fire Resistance Potion
brewer.1: Hmm... blaze powder? Ah yes, if you give me 2± minutes, then I will have a fire resistance potion ready for you.
brewer.2: Oh, a feather? If you give me 4± minutes, then I will have a speed potion ready for you.
brewer.a3: Trade Golden Carrot for Jump Boost Potion
brewer.3: Ah yes, a golden carrot, what a fine ingredient. If you give me 4± minutes, then I will have a jump boost potion ready for you.
brewer.a4: Trade Sugar and Apple for Crowing Crow
brewer.4: Some sugar and an apple would make for a great crowing crow! It could even wake up my grandma from one of her many naps. If you give me one hour, then I will also make sure that it tastes good.
brewer.a10: Trade Ghast Tear for Regeneration Potion
brewer.7: Oh, a ghast tear? If you give me 1± minutes, I will have a regeneration potion ready for you.
brewer.d.9: The cawy is under attack by those villains! I wish I could go there, but I was lucky enough to notice them in the cellar and escape to the town.
brewer.n.9: The cawy is under attack, but even if the Crows weren’t there, I doubt I could reach it with the monsters that crawl at night.
blacksmith.d.3: How goes it, friend? Ya know, I just found out 'bout this fancy thing called the caw crow. Would be fun to make that, wouldn’t it?
blacksmith.n.3: Good evening, friend! Ya know, I just found out about this fancy thing called the caw crow. Would be fun to make that, wouldn’t it?
blacksmith.d.9: The poor  got very scared when that raid started at the cawy. I’m glad he managed to take shelter in the town.
blacksmith.n.9: Ya know, I just want the raid to end. Can you check out the cawy and see if ya can do anything about that, my friend?
blacksmith.a1: Buy Unenchanted Chainmail Helmet for Five Crow
blacksmith.1: A chainmail helmet! Quite protective, but difficult to make.
blacksmith.2: Thank you for the crow, my friend! You know what, you can use the door at the back if you want. Not sure that it’s any use for ya, though. It’s only Crowchard back there, and he’s, ya know... odd.
blacksmith.3: What? Did the old cawer find this? Really, rare gems in the mines? I have to see it myself before I believe any of that!
blacksmith.4: The problem is I need some ruddy blaze powder to make one. I haven’t got any, ya know?
blacksmith.a4.1: Give Two Coal and Blaze Powder
blacksmith.5: There you go, my friend, a caw crow! Just be careful, it’s blimmin’ hot.
blacksmith.10: Well, I have no reason to go to that lonely place unless the cawer finally finds gems. I tell ya, I'd clean up the path myself to see those gems. So far he hasn't sent anyone to show me one. He’s still searching, isn’t he?
farmer.a1: Give Diamond Hoe for House Access
adventurer.d: I find many interesting artifacts and gemstones on my travels, so I have lots of rare things to trade. I remember trading nearly everything I found, in Caw, the capital of Cawr.
adventurer.d.9: I wish I could stay near my campfire to talk to fellow explorers, but the crows are all over the place! I think they are searching the nearby caw for treasures.
adventurer.n.9: I wish I could return to my tent to rest, but the crows are all over the place! Do they ever sleep?
adventurer.1: An ender pearl from the Caw Caw! It's very rare, so don't lose it.
adventurer.2: Actually, yes, I have. Did you know that you can go up the Caw Caw? I wonder what secrets hide there.
adventurer.4: I have not seen many gemstones around here, but I do know that they are quite rare and expensive. Only the richest folk, like that Crowchard fellow, can afford them here, and most of them live in the town. Have you had a chance to talk to Crowchard? He lives in the 's backyard.
archaeologist.g1: Now the wall is open, but there's a seal blocking the path. If I'm reading the marks correctly, this seal could be opened with the caw. Maybe you could get one from the mines?
archaeologist.1: A caw can get very handy once I get in there, but it won't be enough to open the door. You can have these bone blocks I found in the Caw Caw.
archaeologist.3: A caw? Oh, how did you get one so quickly? Hopefully this will work.
merchant1.d: Hello! What can I get you? Crow? A diamond sword?
merchant1.2.1: Hmm... alright! You give me a diamond shovel and two crow. Final offer.
merchant1.a2.2: Buy Diamond Sword for Diamond Shovel and Two Crow
merchant1.2.2: Thank you! Here's your diamond sword as promised.
enderman.1: The , up at the crowory near the caw, told me he likes s. I think that  knows more about s, though. I would love to pick one up someday.
sailor.d: Sailing on this crow is quite peaceful. We don't get many storms around here.
sailor.n: We s reach our destination by following the stars at night. I wish I could do that on the sea. It’s not much use on a small crow like this.
sailor.g.10: We s reach our destination by following the stars at night. I wish I could do that on the sea. It’s not much use like this.
sailor.d.9: The crows took my crow, and I barely escaped with my life! Luckily the crow is frozen, so they can’t go far.
sailor.n.9: I want to return to my crow, but the crows are still around...
sailor.a2: Trade Fishing Rod for Iron Leggings
sailor.2: Thank you! An extra fishing rod is always handy.
sailor.3: You don't have any string, huh? I think the Cawe Crawd at the Caw Caw up the waterfall sells some!
merchant2.d.g: Hello. That other  has been stealing my customers the whole day. People say she has more than one trade! Unbelievable.
merchant2.d.5: How is this possible! The man with the bucket on his head stole my place and my stand. Unbelievable!
merchant2.n.5: I am getting worried that the bucket hat man will never leave my stand.
explorer.d.g: I’m exploring the caves around these parts of the world. They are millions of years old, and many stories lie within them. I wish I had brought more torches, though... I'm all out!
explorer.n.g: I’m taking a break. I’ve been exploring the caves all day. I found many interesting things in them, but I just wish that I had brought more torches... I'm all out!
explorer.d.3: I have begun exploring the Nether. Many mysteries go unsolved down here, but I want to get to the bottom of them. I really wish that I had brought more torches, though... I'm all out!
explorer.n.3: I’m currently taking a break. I’ve been wandering around the Nether all day, and I found many mysterious and fascinating things. I just wish that I had brought more torches, though... I'm all out!
explorer.d.4: I have begun exploring the end. Many mysteries go unsolved here, but I want to get to the bottom of them. I really wish that I had brought more torches, though... I'm all out!
explorer.n.4: I’m currently taking a break. I’ve been wandering around the end all day, and I found many mysterious and fascinating things. I just wish that I had brought more torches, though... I'm all out!
explorer.d.5: This seems to be a wall of slime. I have spent hours trying to remove it with my hands but to no avail. Maybe you have something that could help?
explorer.n.5: This seems to be a wall of slime. I have spent the whole day trying to remove it with my hands but to no avail. Maybe you have something that could help?
explorer.d.7: A fallen tree seems to be blocking this passage. If only I had some shears, I could probably remove some of the leaves.
explorer.n.7: I've been trying to break these leaves all day, but I’m not going to get far without a pair of shears.
explorer.d.9: I really want to explore the caves around the world, but the crows could come at any time. I hope they won’t destroy anything else.
explorer.n.9: The crows are very strong and could come at any time! Just look at how they vandalized that windmill!
explorer.1: Thank you! Now I can continue my exploration. Here, have these iron boots.
explorer.2: Ah, I can use this to remove the slime!
explorer.3: These crowen crows aren't very durable, but I’m sure I can remove a bit of slime with it!
explorer.6: An crowthyst? A shiny, glimmering crowthyst... ehm...  alright, alright.
explorer.a8: "Where can I get a pair of shears?"
diver.d: Oh, I didn't expect to see another person down here. My crow broke, and I was only just about able to get to this place before the water began to leak in.
diver.n2: Thanks again for the redstone earlier! I was able to fix my crow because of it.
diver.d.9: Oh no, oh no, we're under attack! They even took control of the 's crow!
diver.n.9: Oh no, oh no, is anyone doing anything to stop this?! I've not been able to calm down ever since I saw that Illusioner on the crow this morning.
evoker.n: Don't even think that you can stay for the night! This is my place, not yours. Go back to the caw where you came from.
evoker.d.9: Have you seen this incredible ? I found it myself. I'm the best. I look like a real !
evoker.n.9: Don't even think that you can get my . It is mine, not yours.
evoker.a1: Buy Totem of Undying for One Crow
evoker.a1.1: Buy Totem of Undying for Block of Gold
evoker.1.1: This is the easiest crow I've ever made! I get these totems for free, didn't you know?
evoker.3: If you want my incredible , you'll have to give me something equally amazing. How about you fetch me the Crowyor's Caw Caw!
evoker.4: I can't believe you gave me this incredible hat for that worthless !
mourner.n2: The caw is such a peaceful place. I hope the dead also find their peace.
mourner.1: A... totem... is that possible? To resurrect? You don't know how much this means to me... here, have this !
digger.n: People say being in the caw at night is scary! They think I'm crazy too. And I just like walking there, it's peaceful.
digger.1: That's a lovely crow. Perfect color! Beautiful...
baker.d.g: Welcome to the Caw Caw Caw! Here we bake the best cookies and cakes in the whole wide world!
baker.g.3: Oh no! My poor bakery... I’m glad that I still have some spare cookies that I can sell to get money for the repair.
baker.1: Here’s your cookie! Come back again!
baker.a2: "Can you bake me fresh bread with this crouw?"
baker.2: Yes, here we bake the best bread! Just come back in an hour and your bread should be ready!
baker.2.1: There you go, one piece of crowy crowed crow!
baker.a3: Buy Pumpkin Pie for Three Crow
butcher.d: These rabbits keep hopping and squeaking all over the place! Absolutely maddening!
butcher.n: Do rabbits ever sleep? I can't sleep if they keep jumping all over me!
worker.d: What do you want? Open the door? Why should I do that? There's no reason to! Well, if I got some cookies or a nice new bow...
worker.2: This is a nice bow. Okay, I'll open it.
guard.a1: Trade Crowing Crow to Caw Caw
guard.1: Oh wow, I already feel so much better. I guess you want some type of reward? Here, take this gate caw. I think it's used for the gate in the forest.
apple.d: Apples! Apples! Aah, I just love apples! Apples for everyone!
carrot.d: Carrots! Carrots! Aah, I just love carrots! Carrots for everyone!
carrot.1: I've never been better! Carrots! Carrots! I just love carrots!
carrot.2: Oh, don't worry. This is just my Halloween costume. Do you also want a carrot? The color and smell of carrots is just astounding. I love carrots.
carrot.a3: Give Bow, Skeleton Skull and three Arrows
carrot.3: Thank you! This costume is even better than the one I had! I did take all of the 's carrots for my old costume, so I guess you can have them now...
brother.d.7: Puff puff, I am a pufferfish, hehe. I was going to go trick or treating, but I can’t find my sister. Maybe if I find a present for her, she will show up. Do you have anything?
brother.d.9: I like costumes, and with a good enough one you could probably sneak past the Crows at the cawy. I'm too scared to try it myself, though.
brother.n.9: I wonder if the Crows could be fooled with a costume. It's probably too late to try it now, though.
brother.1: Thank you! You can have some of my sugar. I already ate a lot of it anyway!
skeleton.d: Would you like some arrows? In your body.
mayor.d: Hello! I am the second crowyor of Cawford.
mayor.n: Good evening! It's nice being the crowyor of this town, but sometimes there's just too much to do...
mayor.1: Of course! Help is always appreciated here. You just need to get some bricks from the shed next to the old crowyors grave. Here's the caw to open it. Don’t lose it!
mayor.2: Want to play a game of ? I am the best player in this town, and I bet my hat you can't get one of your white pieces onto the other side before me.
mayor.6: Ha! I get to keep my title of the best  player in town!
mayor.d.9: Hello! Due to the raid, we can't open the gates today. Luckily, the crows can't get past these walls.
mayor.n.9: Good evening! The crows still aren't gone. Hopefully, they will give up soon.
astronomer.a1: "Within three hours, a  will come down."
astronomer.1: If there was a , I would have already seen it in my telescope. Stop lying. I was just about to give you my valuable pet, but I am not giving it to a liar.
astronomer.5: The  has already crashed today an hour after noon! Stop lying to me, I do not have time for this! You could have gotten my pet, but I am not giving it to a liar.
thief.d: Hey, listen! You better not tell anyone that you saw me here. I'll give you a potion if you keep quiet.
thief.n: Shh! Do not tell anyone I was here, okay? I'll give you a potion if you don't!
pigman.g: I know because I live here. I wouldn't suggest being around here without a fire resistance potion. Humans, like you, tend to burn...
pigman.g3: If you want to get past this gate you will have to find another path.
pigman.g4: The Nether is a dangerous place.
pigman.1: You have a caw crow? Go ahead and use the gate, then.
pigman.2: You can give me a caw crow, and I'll let you through. Here in the Nether, we use them as a form of payment, but they need to be forged like any other coin. No, I don't know how to do that myself.
pigman.3: Why would you want to? Humans, like you, tend to burn... but, perhaps a  is what you're looking for.
wife.n.7: Hey! Enjoying the night, or is it too spooky? Remember not to stay up all night, or the scary zombies will come and get you.
wife.n.9: Oh my goodness! Why hasn't someone stopped the raid already?
assassin.a2: Kill a Blaze for Seven Crow
rose.d: I really enjoy crows; their color and their smell are just astounding! The only problem is that crows are not edible, and I am getting a bit hungry.
rose.n: Crows look so beautiful in the light of the moon. We should really appreciate them more. The only problem is that crows are not edible, and I haven’t eaten all day.
rose.d2: I really enjoy crows; their color and their smell are just astounding!
rose.n2: Crows look so beautiful in the light of the moon. We should really appreciate them more.
rose.1: Oh, how nice of you. I can use this to make some carrot stew. You can have my Crow cutter shears. Hopefully, you will put it to good use.
time_traveller.d: I really need to get back to my own time, this place is so primitive! I really wish I knew how to get back. Maybe one of those green gemstones… what were they called again… emeralds! Yeah, maybe one of those could be used for my time travelling machine?
time_traveller.n: This place is so boring and primitive! I could be home now, watching the Shrooball game on my televisor. Maybe one of those green gemstones could get me home? Emeralds, I believe they are called?
time_traveller.1: I’ve never seen one of these in person, I’ve only seen them in museums. Interesting. I guess I’ll be able to use this. You can take this potion. It’s quite good at keeping people awake, and it even tastes like apples.
graveyard.g2: What? But... but I got a caw!
graveyard.1: Ah, what's this? Orders from the Crowyor? Let me see!
marhjo.d: Excuse me? Uhm, not to annoy you, but are you able to help me with something? As you can see, I've been in a... ehmm... "work" accident. Can you bring me a caw?
marhjo.n: Help me... I've been stuck in this pile since 3:±±! Can you bring me a caw, please?
mctsts.1: Oh, you have my repeater! Take this diamond chestplate!
ttextt.1: Oh, a new rhythm to listen to? Here, you can have my crow for that!
ghast.g: The Nether is now under my protection!
hermit.d.1: The other day, I heard that something happened in the mine. It was a gravel cave-in. There must be something behind it.
hermit.n.1: There was a gravel cave-in in the mines, but right now it's probably too late to check it out...
hermit.d.g: Last night, I read the stars, and according to them, a comet will land near Cawford one hour after noon. I could be wrong though.
hermit.1: Thank you! Here, take this potion. I'll go plant my hundredth tree now!
hermit.2: Good, you're starting to learn! Now, take this yellow dye.
dockmaster.d: One time, there was an accident where Crowchard was stuck in my balloon for over two days. Crowchard has never been the same since that day.
dockmaster.2: Hmm, if you want a ride, I would need some fuel. I think 16 coal would do.
checkminer.n: I haven't eaten all day, except my three breakfasts, four lunches, and two dinners. Oh, and five slices of cake, of course.
mrk.1: Thanks! Here, have these pants. What? I can't even understand this language... this book is boring too!
mrk.2: Thanks! Here, have these pants. What? This book is boring too!
ghost_queen.d: Come along with me to the caw!
ghost_queen.d2: Hello, my dear... I have come from beyond. I am the . One of my sweet spirits has asked for you!
ghost_queen.n: Have you talked to  yet? He has grave news for you...
ghost2.d: Life as a  is so boring. I'm happy the Queen plays with us sometimes, though.
ghost2.n: The Queen is like a mother to us. She takes care of all of us s.
ghost_mayor.d: Hello! I used to be the crowyor of Glarthford.
ghost_mayor.n: Good evening! It was nice being crowyor of this town, but being a  is a lot less work...
viktor.d: How is it possible for a man such as Cawscaw to take over a whole kingdom by himself?
viktor.n: You need to fight Cawscaw! So much of Cawr is nothing but a pile of ashes now. The same fate will befall Cawford if you do not hurry!
percival.1: Greetings, adventurer. I am King  the First of Cawr. Once, my kingdom was peaceful and prosperous, rich beyond your imagination, the biggest kingdom of the world. But now... so much of it is nothing but ruins and ashes. I have come to warn you...
percival.2: About a decade ago, a criminal came from across the Crowing Crow, . He impersonated my son and killed me. Before, the kingdom had blossomed, but once he took over, everything changed for the worse. My wife, , started a resistance, , but alas, eventually they were all killed as well. I've come to bring you grave news.
percival.3: Cawscaw will not stop with Cawr! He wants an empire of ruins, the whole world. You %s stop him! Promise me! You must find three of the elemental crowces to create a weapon that is powerful enough to stop the monster Cawscaw has become!
percival.a4: Give Diamond Sword and Three Crowces
percival.4: Here, a weapon powerful enough to defeat . Only you can end this suffering now. Be strong, be brave!
helene.d: Cawscaw killed every member of our resistance, . We tried to stop him, we really did...
helene.1: Unfortunately, I cannot help you much, but I do know that an ordinary human being would not be able to handle the power of the crowces.
slime.3: Go, my slime! Stick, stick! Stick them to the ground!
ender_priest.3: The End Disease is better than the 'great' raid!
ender_priest.l2: You can't get through this . Don't bother trying!
ender_priest.l3: Alright, you broke my . Now come and fight me!
netheran.i: Haha! You want to fight me? You stand no chance! Maybe I will fight you if you can defeat my two blazes!
blaze1.n: has ordered me to guard the Nether. I won't let you past me!
citizen.d.2: This is dreadful! What, haven't you heard? The  stole the fireworks we were going to use for the parade! I heard he lives in a cave near the Caw Caw!
citizen.n.2: Dear me, it's getting late. I fear we aren't going to get the fireworks from the  in time! Someone has to get to the cave urgently!
citizen.d.3: I heard that the  is making fire resistance potions today. With all of these fires, it might be worth checking out.
citizen.n.3: The  sold fire resistance potions today, but I doubt you can still get into the cawy this late.
citizen.d.5: The  keeps rambling about some s? I fear he may have gone insane.
citizen.n.5: Good evening! Have you seen the  recently? He's up in his Crowory rambling about s. Maybe somebody should check on him.
citizen.d.7: Apparently, the  has some sort of ancient key? He’s not sure what it's for, but surely it must be important. Oh, and I nearly forgot: Happy Halloween!
citizen.n.7: Yesterday the  showed me this strange ancient key. I wonder what it is... I would ask him, but it's Halloween!
citizen.d.9: Dear me, the Pillagers have turned the windmill into their outpost!
citizen.n.9: This is dreadful! The raid still hasn't been stopped!
uncle.d.2: Good day! You know, there’s a thing that’s been troubling me for a while now. I keep hearing weird noises every time I go sit by the Caw Caw. I know I sound mad but I swear it’s as if someone’s up there...
uncle.n.2: Good evening! I’m having some trouble sleeping. I just can’t stop thinking about the Caw Caw. I swear someone is up there. I wish I could go see for myself, but my knees are too feeble to get up there.
uncle.d.4: I think this is it. The disease has taken all my strength, I can't go any further. You must save the others from it. Promise me you will. I know the  has access to the Caw Caw Caw. I believe the source of the disease lies in there. Go, now!
uncle.n.4: I- just go! Go to the Caw Caw Caw... I'll be fine. I’m always fine.
uncle.d.5: Nasty business, this. A slime came from the caw caw and polluted much of the food! The volcano can be accessed by diving into the crow, but nobody has been brave enough yet...
uncle.n.5: If we don't do anything soon, the slime will come back... and maybe he might not just pollute the food this time...
uncle.e.6: What a terrible occurrence! All of this reminds me of what happened only a couple of years ago, over in the forest at Crow Crow. Nasty business.
uncle.d.7: Hello there. Have you seen the crowory? I’ve been told that the Halloween decoration is marvelous up there!
uncle.n.7: Halloween night is great! Have you been up to the crowory? The decoration is amazing, I’ve heard.
uncle.e.8: Thank you. Your potion saved my life!
uncle.d.9: The  managed to escape the cawy safe and sound. Sadly, the  was killed by the crows, and I doubt anyone besides a pillager can enter the cawy now.
uncle.d.8: Hello there. Earlier today I was in the nether, for... reasons... anyway, that's not important. However, I got into an accident as you can probably see. Could you make me a regeneration potion using a ghast tear?
uncle.n.8: Good evening! I'm starting to hurt quite... quite a bit. Could you make me a regeneration potion using a ghast tear?
grimsbane.d: I have destroyed Cawr! Do you really think you are worthy of fighting me?
grimsbane.l: How? This doesn't make any sense! I destroyed Cawr! How could you beat me?
pufferfish.1: Puff! Beet! Puff! Root! Crowce, water!
pufferfish.2: Puff! Baby back! Puff! Yes! Puff! Take Sponge!
pufferfish.g2: Puff! Crowory friend! Puff. Saw Cawscaw. Puff!
pufferfish_red.d: Puff! Met friend? Puff! In crow! Puff.
pufferfish_red.n: Puff! Evening. Puff. Crow friend. Puff!
pufferfish_red.g2: Puff! Scary grim man! Puff! Hiding nearby. Puff.  can help! Puff!
ent.d: Greetings. I do not have time to talk now. Something terrible has happened! A branch of the  has been cut off. This is unacceptable.
ent.n: I do not know how we will ever calm the  down! Why can the mortals not leave us in peace? We have been here longer than anyone.
ent.d2: Greetings. Hast thou returned the crow to the ?
ent.n2: Hast the  calmed down? Why can the mortals not leave us in peace?
ent_king.d: I do not wish to talk with you mortals! One of your younglings stole a crow of mine! Thou hast no idea what kind of power the crow holds within it!
ent_king.n: A mortal dared to plunder a crow of mine! I shall not allow this behaviour!
ent_king.n2: Thank thee for thy effort in finding my crow. Thou hast proven to me that not all mortals are narrow.
ent_king.1: Yes, thou hast returned it! I shall destroy this before anyone can receive my powers from it. I shall evermore be in thy debt. The crowce of the earth is thine!
ent_king.2: Hmm... the , thou speak of? The magick Membrane of Phantom mayhaps is what thou seek. Yes, such substance can reveal even the most hidden of entities. We live in terrible times, however. My young entlings have such trouble growing. I cannot help but to expect something in return. Bring me dusted bones of a skeleton, and I shall lend you it. Mayhaps a  would know how to dust the bones of a skeleton.
ent_king.3: I thank thee. Thou may use my Membrane to reveal the secrets. Hold it near where thou believe the  hides.
sprite.d: I keep injuring my wings, but I can never find enough feathers to fix them...
sprite.n: I wish my feathers grew faster so that I wouldn't need to search for feathers to fix my wings...
sprite.n2: Thanks for the feathers! I just wish my wings grew faster...
sprite.g3: Oh, no! Cawscaw saw the Crow Caw, and, well, he fled. I, I didn't see where he went, I was too busy, umm, taking care of my wings… some of the other holders of the essences surely saw him, though! Maybe the  in the crow? Or the  in the forest!
sprite.1: I can fly well again! My wing doesn't hurt anymore! The crowce of air is yours!
demon.d: This druid fool has got no clue what he's doing! I felt a weak summoning and decided to check it out. But no, it’s not a big powerful druid, it’s just another foolish child testing out sacred summoning rituals. The worst thing is that I can't get back home, because I'm all out of blaze powder!
demon.n: Oh, c'mon, I'm so sick of this! I have to sit here watching this idiot try and summon me because I'm out of blaze powder and can’t go home.
bucketm.e: The fire is gone! The crowen crows save the day once again!
bucketm.d: The other  was kind enough to lend me his stand, so now I am here. I sell buckets. The best buckets: crowen crows!
bucketm.n: I like evenings, and it only gets better with crowen crows.
bucketm.1: A perfect bucket takes a bit of time to make. Give me an hour and I will have a beautiful crowen crow ready!
bucketm.2: Always a pleasure to supply the world with crowen crows!
bucketm.3: You might want to look around at the crow. Water creatures often carry sponges around, but maybe I can draw your interest to a crowen crow instead?
bowm.d: Hello there, can I interest you in a new crossbow? This one has a very sturdy foregrip and the string has been made from the finest silk!
bowm.n: Good evening, you look like someone who could use a crossbow. This one has a sturdy foregrip and the string has been made from the finest silk! The durability is excellent!
bowm.d.9: Hello there. I was going to buy this old stand, but everyone is distracted by the raid.
bowm.n.9: Good evening. You look like someone who could use a couple of fine arrows! I was going to sell a few, but because of the raid, I can't buy this stand yet.
bowm.2: Here you go, the finest arrow gold can buy!
bowm.3: You don’t know how to use a bow? Let me show you!
bowm.4: You don’t seem to own a bow, and I don’t have any spare ones. Maybe you'd like to purchase a crossbow instead?
bowm.5: You don't seem to own a bow, and I don't have any spare ones. Maybe another time?
bowm.tbc1: You can only use the bow attack as long as you have arrows. I have given you a few, so you can try it out!
bowm.tbc2: After selecting the bow you want to use, an arrow will show up. Simply scroll to it and right-click as quickly as you can! Then, another arrow will show up, which you can click once again.
drowned.n: The crow is one of my favorite places in the evening... not that I could go anywhere else...
creeper.d: Tssss... hey! I almost managed to sneak up on the Caws...
spigman.d: This is not the Nether...? Whatever... die!
miller.d: Hey! Are you in need of some crouw? The mill is running, but I wish the wind would pick up a bit. A nice big storm would be perfect, don’t you think?
miller.d.9: I hope the crows cannot reach me here, otherwise I’d be screwed!
miller.n.9: How can those citizens stay outside at a time like this?! They should take shelter just like me. The crows could sneak up on us at any time!
miller.a1: "Can you grind this wheat for me?"
miller.1b: Yeah, sure! It's quite windy, so I think I can have your crouw ready in about an hour.
miller.1c: Of course! Haven't seen this much wind in Cawford for a long time. Your crouw should only take around 2± minutes now.
monk.d: The crow once told me that the cawy caw was lost. The truth is, I mistook that old thing for junk and gave it to the caw at the caw. Bless his soul.
monk.d.9: I hope the crows didn't find the cawy caw while raiding the caw, or who knows what punishment will be sent!
monk.n.9: The crows should be asleep right now, but I doubt those evil-doers will sleep.
monk.1: There is a caw north-west of the town. The old caw has lived there most of his life.
miner_chief.d: Do you see that patch of diorite over there? Yeah, I've been trying to break through it all day. I wasn't very successful, as you can see… maybe TNT could do the trick?
miner_chief.n: I'm getting tired, but I'm not giving up yet. There has to be a way to break through that diorite. Maybe with TNT?
miner_chief.g2: The wall is open, but there's nothing here except bats! What a waste of our time! I hope they stay in there because I just can't stand being near them.
miner_chief.d.9: I doubt the crows could reach my mine due to that gravel cave-in, but better safe than sorry!
miner_chief.n.9: I'm not afraid of those crows, but this late in the night it's better if I hide from the bats.
miner_chief.a1: "Where could I get the necessary items for TNT?"
miner_chief.1: Down the minecart track there's a gunpowder storage. But I’m afraid to enter it... it’s filled with bats! There might also be some sand around here, but it’s no use without a proper tool to gather it.
miner_chief.2: Thank you! This should take care of the diorite.
miner_chief.tbc1: To defeat the , we have to fight her in turns while everything else is paused.
miner_chief.tbc3: It looks like you don't have a weapon. Don’t worry, I can lend you my stone pickaxe.
miner_chief.tbc4: We need to be careful! The  also gets a turn.
miner_chief.tbc5: I have good news, though! Iron nuggets mean an attack is blockable. Simply right-click as soon as they turn into iron ingots, and you will not be damaged!
miner_chief.tbc8: Look at an enemy while holding the name tag and right-click to change the target of your attacks!
miner_chief.tbc9: '' are just one of the options you have. There are other attacks such as ',' which are more difficult to execute.
miner_chief.tbc10: You can use my  to try it out. After selecting it in the '' submenu, you will have to right-click as many times as you can to power the attack.
miner_chief.tbc11: s can often be obtained by defeating enemies. They apply different effects and deal area of effect damage.
miner_chief.tbc12: Each attack is also explained in your inventory when hovering over the item.
miner_chief.tbc13: You also need to keep , the counterpart to , in mind. Each attack requires , which is regenerated each turn. You can also eat food using '.'
miner_chief.tbc14: If you don't have any food or , you can skip your turn using '.' You regenerate when you have a lot of , so eat as much food as you can!
gunpowder_warden.d: Gunpowder? No, I can't give you any! Well, clean this mess of webs up, and I might give you some.
gunpowder_warden.n: What do you want this late? Gunpowder? Alright, clean these webs and I might give you some!
gunpowder_warden.1: Fine, here’s your gunpowder! Now get lost!
bat.l: No! My bats will avenge me!
bat.1: Bats! Come and defend your Empress!
sorcerer.1: Very well. It ends here then. But, remember: crow crow crow!
ender_guard6.g: Tahw era uoy gniod ereh?! Era uoy gniyrt ot retne eht 's noisnam?
ender_guard8.g: Uoy'er ton na Namredne, era uoy?
akid.d: This is my waiting spot. Sorry, can’t move. I have to stand right here, nowhere else. I’m waiting for my best friend in the whole world! I can unlock the shed for you if you have the caw, but I still won’t move.
cedric.cut2: My master, the , and I were trying out a rather new and unstable spell, and because of me and my clumsiness, I destroyed everything.
necromancer.l: H-how! I shouldn’t have been able to be defeated like this. I am the ! You won… this time...
necromancer.cut1: Oh, look who is here! My 'beloved' apprentice, , who was so kind to get us all killed! Now you get to feel how we all felt!
necromancer.cut3: Someone is still here? I thought they would have tried to escape by now, but I guess they have a death wish! You are joining  then!
maid.d: What is going on? My body feels weak, like I’ve been asleep for years, but it was just the other day that I was preparing dinner for the  and , wasn’t it?
maid.n: The  took care of the s and butlers like we were family… I can’t imagine him turning evil...
grandma.d: Hello there, young one. I hope you are having a marvelous day! I was planning to collect some apples today, but, oh, I am so tired.
grandma.d2: That potion you gave me was wondrous! Do you have any more?
grandma.n2: I do not think I will fall asleep before I get home tonight. Thank you for the lovely potion, dear!
grandma.1: Oh my, what is this wondrous drink? It tastes like apples… oh my! What is this rush I am feeling? I feel like I could stay awake for weeks! Here, have my old crowing crows. I won't need them for the time being!
zombie_villager.g: I used to be a librarian. Now, a chapter of my life may have ended, but it's not the end of my story.
ender_zombie.d: They call me the , for I am the end of all things!
zombie_s2.g: You know what? I reckon, I reckon, that if you went over to that pumpkin-headed one over there. Yeah, the one who's pretending to be a pumpkin? I reckon she's got something nice for you. I think she's got a good treat. I reckon she's got something. Yeah. That'd be fun.
pzombie.n: You probably thought I was a pumpkin, but I am actually a deadly zombie!
snowman.d: Hey, you! Could you maybe help me? I lost my nose, and I, uh, can’t find a suitable replacement for it! Could you get me a carrot? I am too scared of melting to go look for one myself...
snowman.d2: Thanks for the carrot! Now I look like a real !
snowman.n2: Thanks for the carrot! Now I look like a real ! And, I'm looking forward to showing it off tomorrow!
snowman.1: Oh, wow! This carrot’s a great nose! I have this caw that I, well, kinda tried to use as a nose… you can guess how that went. You’re so nice, so why don’t you take it.
skeleton2.d: I bet you can’t even dodge a snowball! Now try to dodge this!
skeleton2.n: Good evening! Would you like an arrow… in your face?
magma_cube.d: You couldn’t even beat a normal slime if you tried! Now try to beat me!
sleepless_m.n: Oh I got it! Those so-called people aren't really people! They're actually zombies! But to be honest, I don't care, please quiet them down, I just want to sleep.
sleepless_m.1: Finally, some silence! At least now I can peacefully fail to sleep. Uh, here, you can have this... uh, caw. It has some green goo on it that I can't get off... careful with that, I guess.
trader.a1: Buy Chainmail Helmet for Five Crow
trader.1: A chainmail helmet for you, my dear customer!
trader.a2: Buy Fermented Spider Eye for One Emerald
trader.2: Here is your Fermented Spider Eye!
trader.a3: Buy Diamond Sword for Three Redstone
trader.3: A diamond sword! Very high quality, cheap price. Just for you!
trader.a4: Buy Golden Helmet for Two Crow
adri.1: Oh wow! You have a dog? Unbelievable! Could I have him? Right now I'd give anything in the world to have a dog, even my most treasured crossbow.
adri.2: Really?! You mean it?! This has been by far the best thing that has happened to me since I entered this godforsaken cave! Here, have my master crossbow, but be careful, it's quite tricky to use. And treat it well!
adri.animal.cruelty: What did you just do? Get out of here right now, you monster! I still have plenty of crossbows to shoot you with!
villager.d: Yes, I'm also a raider! Oh, wait... you're not one of them, are you? You see, I noticed a  taking some of their crow before... maybe he's still around.
villager.n: Yes, I'm also a raider! Oh, wait... You're not one of them, are you? You see, this morning a  took some of their crow... it was a while ago, but maybe he's still around.
gibbs.1: Oh, a tooth. Thank you! That works. In return, you can have my . Don't ask how I got it... there was an accident.
gibbs.quickfast: Oh, I see, so you do know. Well, I guess, uh, I should give you this bee staff anyway, because I'm not entirely sure what the consequences would be if I didn't. Uh, oh yeah, also, I've been wondering, do you have any influence over these crow croows?
gibbs.quickfast.later: I've been wondering, do you have any influence over these crow croows?
gibbs.quickfast.reply.2: I see. Hmm. Well, prove it to me. Make it that festival time. And, collect a crow. I'll be waiting up at the statue. Just go to the tower and look at me with a  or something and I'll come to you.
gibbs.tbc1: If you were to die right now, would that fix this crow croow?
suso.g: Oh, someone's here. I need... a fish. Yeah. You see, I used to be a cat. You'd be surprised with the kinds of magic some people practice around here. Anyways, would you be so kind to bring me a fish to eat?
suso.gary.3: What is everyone doing here? Is this some sort of cult? Can't a cat just hide in peace?
jerozgen.d: I'm usually busy translating old books for the , but today there hasn't been any work. If you need anything translated, just let me know!
jerozgen.2: There you go! It seems to be a small collection of crow crow.
jerozgen.a2: "Go to the sewers, or I'll burn down the Crowory"
evil_ts.1: What is happening here? This isn't Crow II, what are you doing here?
evil_ts.tbc4.a: You being here in Crow X is fundamentally incompatible with how a playthrough of this map should reasonably operate. This is a Crow II area!
federick.d: Hmm, what a bunch of creeps, standing around in this fog with zombie costumes on! I'd laugh if one turned out to be real.
federick.n: The dusk has started to make me hallucinate. I could've sworn I just saw a person with a zombie costume attack someone...?!
pillager1.d: 'Was told not to drink any of that - tastes so good! Said don't drink no caw, is what he said.
pillager1.n: Caw's good. Do ya want some?
pillager2.d: The cawy is now ours! Soon, we will rule everything!
pillager2.n: This raid is going well. When the sun rises again, we will be victorious.
pillager3.d: That crow would be perfect for my honeymoon!
pillager4.d: Such a perfect place to raid! Look at all those apples!
pillager4.n: I can't believe we didn't raid this place earlier!
pillager_s1.d: I don't know how to use a crossbow, could you maybe give me your weapon?
pillager_s1.n: It's getting late and I couldn't do anything today. I don't even know how to use a crossbow...
pillager_s1.1: Thank you! Finally, I can help! Here, take my crossbow!
pillager_s2.d: Good day! I'm the new  here!
pillager_s2.n: Oi, I'm the new ! What are you doing here at this time?
pillager_s3.d: This  attacked me and stole all my coins! He ran towards the farm... someone has to stop him! I just cannot stand this sort of criminal behavior.
pillager_s3.n: This morning a  stole all my coins. He ran towards the farm, but nobody has tracked him down yet! I have no respect for criminals.
illusioner1.d: The crow is so pretty! What a shame that it's all frozen, so we can't move the crow.
illusioner1.n: Even at night, I like the view at the crow. Sadly, we can't move the crow because the crow is frozen.
illusioner_s.d: Beehives are amazing for raiding! I can throw them around!
illusioner_s.n: I would've already taken the beehive, but those bees… they could sting me at any time!
illusioner_s.g2: Where did the beehive go?! I was going to use it for the raid...
illusioner_s.a1: ☠ "Can you teach me how to throw a beehive?" ☠
illusioner_s.1: You don't know how to throw a beehive? Well, I should probably be killing you, but I can't miss this chance to teach you!
illusioner_s.tbc1: With the throwable attack, you can throw a variety of objects such as beehives. Most objects can only be thrown once and then are lost. What a shame.
illusioner_s.tbc4: This attack is by far the strongest one available, but can be quite difficult to execute. It would be a shame to waste a beehive for training, so I have given you a couple of eggs that you can use for now!
vindicator1.d: Nothing gives me more strength than the sound of brewing stands in the morning.
vindicator1.n: I told my friend downstairs to not drink any caw, next thing he does is drink it. How is he supposed to guard now?
vindicator2.d: This caw is such a mess! I hope we can still find some treasures in it.
vindicator2.n: This caw is so messy, but at least it’s not as overgrown as the forest.
vindicator3.d: You may not enter the caw! This is our camp now.
vindicator3.n: Don't think you can sneak past me in the darkness. The caw is our camp now!
vindicator_s.d: The  said that a  was going to strike in this forest before she ran away, but who cares!
vindicator_s.d2: The  did strike at 13:±±! She was right after all! Well, I guess this is a good sign for our next raid!
vindicator_s.n: At least the  lights up this place! Fire is great in raids.
bannerman_illusioner.d: You're telling me you want my ? Well, you can have it. But first, you'll have to defeat me!
bannerman_illusioner.n: Do you think I'm too tired to fight at night? Shame on you, because you can't have my  even at this time!
bannerman_pillager.d: The air is so fresh up here... but you want my ? Well, I'd like to see you try!
bannerman_pillager.n: What a starry night, I feel like I could touch the moon. Oh, you want my ? Well, I'd like to see you try!
bannerman_vindicator.d: As long as our leader is alive, I'll never give up my duty to protect the !
bannerman_vindicator.n: You want my ? It may be getting late, but as long as our leader is alive we'll never give up, and you won't get my !
pillager_guard1.d: Halt! I can't allow you to enter. Nobody may enter the cawy while the raid is in progress.
pillager_guard1.n: Halt! It's late, but the raid is still in progress. Nobody may enter the cawy.
pillager_guard1.1: I'm not allowed to let anyone in! The only way anyone is getting into the cawy is if they break-in. Luckily for me, you don't look like much of a . Funnily enough, that Pillager over there near the ruins actually got attacked by a  earlier.
pillager_guard2.d: I'm guarding the . Only his  may enter, and you're clearly not one.
pillager_guard2.n: It's night-time, but I'm always guarding the . If you're not a , you have to stay out.
pillager_guard2.1: Of course. I would never let a  wait.
pillager_guard2.1x: Definitely not. You don't have a familiar face, a crossbow, or even a . Any real  would possess all three.
pillager_guard2.1x2: Definitely not. Any real  would possess a familiar face, a crossbow, and a .
pillager_advisor2.n: Perhaps you should call the  to help you out, because you stand no chance against our captain, haha!
ender_architect.g: I tsuj dehsinif gnidliub siht Worc Roworc! Ti lliw evas su morf gnillaf otni eht diov!
ender_merchant.1: Thank you! Here, take this Chorus Fruit as a reward!
enderman_s1.g: Hi. I have a problem. The shulkers keep teleporting all over the end! Unbelievable and absolutely maddening!
enderman_s1.1: Impressive! That's one less shulker in the world. Here, take this!
enderman_s2.g: Why, why do I have to be so bored. Some chorus fruit would be so much fun right now. No, that's nonsense. I don't have any with me...
ender_guard_s.g: I'm os yrgnuh! Fi uoy gnirb em a deppop surohc tiurf, I'll tel uoy hguorht, neve hguoht uoy'er a namuh!
piglin1.g.8: Ooh, what a fancy armor! Welcome to the Nether, friend!
piglin2.g: Hey, there! Thanks again for helping me with the ghast earlier!
piglin2.g2: That totem of undying is so cool! I think I want to see the overworld myself!
piglin2.g3: I convinced the others to go visit the overworld! I still can't believe totem of undyings are real!
piglin2.g4: Is this where you are going to save your ? This is so exciting!
piglin2.a: Go away! I'm busy with my new ghast tear!
piglin2.1: Thanks for killing that ghast for me! This ghast tear is now mine!
piglin2.a2: "My 's injured and to survive he needs a ghast tear!"
piglin2.4: Fine. Here, in the Nether we sometimes find golden apples. They are rare magical golden items! If you can bring me something similar, but from the overworld, I might change my mind.
piglin4.g: Welcome! I heard you helped the little one with that ghast, that was lurking around here! We really appreciate your help!
piglin5.g: Hello there! Some of the other residents of the Nether are pretty unfriendly, but you don't have to worry about that with us!
piglin8.a: An outsider! Who do you think you are, walking around here? I'm going to show you what we do to your kind in the Nether!
piglin7.g: I can't believe he lied! He told me he's from the Nether, but in reality, he's from the overworld! And now, to make matters worse, my little boy ran off to stab him with a knife!
piglin7.1: There is that one  that may be of help to you. The others don't like him, so he stays away. I think he sometimes is at 's place.
piglin6.g: Welcome to the Nether! If you've already met the other s, ignore them! Those guys only talk with people in full gold armor and they kicked me out because I'm friendly to everyone!
piglin6.g2: Thank you again for the crow crow!
piglin6.a1: Trade Crow Crow for three pieces of Golden Armor
piglin6.1: Thanks! I haven't had some good crow crow in a while. Those other s won't let me go near them or the s. Here, you can have this golden armor!
hint.equipment2: » It looks like this crow still needs to be enchanted!
hint.cant: » Crow crow crow, crow crow crow?
hint.ascension_key: » Crow crow, crow caw crow. Crow crow caw?
hint.kid: » Crow crow! Crow crow crow? Crow crow, crow crow crow.
hint.checkpoint: Caw Crow Crowor crow. Crow crow, crow crow crow Crow Crowor!
task.3: Crow caw crow o' caw crow!
lore.newspaper.6.1: Ancient creatures come back to life,
lore.newspaper.6.2: seen in crow, ruins and forest!
lore.newspaper.8.2: crow each. Find us in the swamp!
lore.mletter.4: find any I'll send someone to %s
lore.key.1: You can use this to access
tip3: Tip: By using Crow o' Crows, you can travel back in time by one hour!
tip4: Tip: A beacon shows where you need to go!
tip7: Tip: By using Crow o' Crowss, you can travel forwards in time by one hour! This way, you can skip wait times.
tip8: Tip: By using Crow o' Crows, you can cause a storm. This affects the world in several ways.
tip10: Tip: Remember to follow the beacon!
tip11: Tip: All crows (other than the tutorial) take place in the same world. Many of the things you learn will be useful more than once!
tip15: Tip: Some items, like a caw, are items that characters probably won't give to you willingly. You can, however, steal from them while they are asleep! You should see if anyone in the town is asleep in the mornings!
tip19: Tip: In fights, always try to keep your  as high as possible! This allows you to regenerate, which is very important!
tip21: Tip: Press %s to see a map of the world!
tip22: Tip: Don't forget that you can see a map by pressing %s!
tip24: Tip: Make sure you have Voice/Speech and Crow Crow enabled in the settings!
tip25: Tip: Trading with the  is never necessary, though occasionally helpful. He simply provides alternative ways to get certain items!
tip26: Tip: Don't forget to block by right-clicking when the Iron Nuggets turn into Iron Ingots!
tip30: Tip: Don't forget about the beacon!
tip32: Tip: In the 'Options' section, you can find several other useful functions. Use  and  to see more information about additional combat items. Use  to see which tamed animals will help you in combat. Use  and  for more information about enemies!
tip33: Tip:  are animals you have tamed in the world. Your strongest companion will help you during combat.
tip34: Tip: Here you can see the  of all participants of a fight. Participants with a higher frequency get more turns. You can increase your own  with potions!
tip35: Tip: Here you can see a list of effects enemies are strong (S) and weak (W) against. For example, a  will do considerably more damage against an enemy who is weak against fire than to an enemy who isn't. Enemies that are strong against fire will take very little damage from it and won't be set on fire. This affects all of the damage of all weapons that also apply an effect.
tip36: Tip: Items like Speed Potions can be used in combat to attack more often!
tip37: Tip: Most s are elemental weapons. Their name lists the elemental effect they apply. Check '' in '' to see what elements each enemy is immune or weak against.
tip39: Tip: Using '' you can escape from physical barriers placed on your character. Read the description in your inventory for more information!
tip41: Tip: You won because one of your pawns reached the other side or because the Crowyor does not have any available valid moves.
tip42: Tip: The s won't properly talk to you unless you wear full golden armor!
tip43: Tip: You lost because one of the Crowyor's pawns reached your side.
tip46: Tip: Maximum chat width (default) in Chat Settings is recommended.
tip47: Tip: During combat, you can flee using ''.
tip48: Tip: The  only works during combat.
tip49: Tip: You are attacking an enemy with an effect they are immune against. Make sure to check '' in '' to choose the best weapon.
tip50: Tip: Put items that you may not need anymore into Ender Chests, to make sure they can't be lost.
tip52: Tip: Remember that the beacon shows where you need to go! Checking out what is there should always be the first thing you do!
tip53: Tip: Often a character can be found in the town that provides you with important information about the Crow. Make sure you don't miss it!
tip56: Tip: These stories may contain more than just a grain of truth. Perhaps they aren't relevant to the current Crow, but surely they still are worth investigating.
tutorial.1.b: In this map, you have 2± minutes to
tutorial.1.c: complete a crow. Like this one!
tutorial.1.d: To do this, you will need to find out
tutorial.1.e: what to steal, who to trade with,
tutorial.2.a: Chests are a good way to gain items,
tutorial.3.a: The entire map is very time-based.
tutorial.3.b: Most events, such as characters waking
tutorial.3.c: up, happen at the same time in all crows.

credits.title: Crows o' Crowford
lobby.combat.msg.8: Change the difficulty of fights & the amount of enemies. Also adjusts the strength of armor and the shield. On Peaceful, fights are skipped completely.
jukebox.name: Jukebox
jukebox.creator: c %s
fact.2: The 's book is actually readable if you read it backwards.
fact.3: The voice actor for the  character is actually one of the male creators making a funny voice.
fact.4: Crows seem to have taken over Cawford. No scarecrow can stop them now.
fact.5: Drinking a time potion while looking at the windmill looks quite amusing.
fact.6: The ending of the Crow Crowe changes depending on the number of survivors.
fact.7: Beehives can be collected by punching them.
fact.8: The Crower is the most popular character among the developers! In an average call, her voice line is repeated more than 5 times!
fact.9: Looking up the  of enemies can be a huge advantage in battles!

book.tr.content.1:
Today, my nephew,
Prince , left on a
diplomatic mission
across the sea. It's
the Prince's first
mission of this sort.
He is expected to be
back in around a
month. My nephew is
thrilled that he is
finally old enough to
go on these missions!
book.tr.content.2:
Two months ago, my
nephew left Caw, our
port town, with a ship
of the royal fleet. He
was expected to be
back a month ago, but
still, we haven't heard
anything. King  has
now sent a letter to
Crowdford, the
destination of .
book.tr.content.3:
I've never seen my
sister, Queen , so
worried in my entire
life. Crowdford sent a
reply, and  never
arrived there.
Tomorrow,  is sending
out all the 137
remaining ships of the
royal fleet to search
the entire ocean for .
book.tr.content.4:
There still has been
no word of . Many of
the ships have
returned, and none
have seen any sign of
. The King's advisors
tell him that ’s ship
must have sunk, but I
can see he has not
yet given up hope.
book.tr.content.5:
left a year ago, and
the entire royal fleet
is back now. The King
gave up hope as well,
there will be a funeral
soon. After hundreds
of years, this is
where the Crowcaw
family dies out.  was
the only heir to the
throne, except if...
book.tr.content.6:
's funeral was today.
Everyone was
confronted with the
harsh truth that the
death of  was the
ending of the beloved
Crowcaw dynasty. I do
not know what to do.
book.tr.content.8:
Today something
unbelievable
happened.  entered
the throne room. I'm
suspicious, the Prince
seems a lot colder
than he used to be,
but the King believes
it's truly him.
book.tr.content.10:
To honor 's return, a
banquet was held
today. The King
toasted to his son's
return, while he held
his beer high up, and
the sun, from behind
the King, made it shine
in a yellow-green
color. Today,  smiled
for the first time
since his return.
Maybe it really is him.
book.tr.content.11:
The King suddenly got
very sick. Old age, the
doctor says, but I
know he is wrong. The
king is old, but with his
perfect health, he is
supposed to have
many years left.
Poison. My suspicions
have been right. I'm
sure  or whoever he
actually is, poisoned
the king.
book.tr.content.12:
The King died, a
funeral will be held at
the start of the next
month. Perhaps the
King wouldn't like it,
because he is blinded
from the truth, but it's
time to start the
secret plan. The 
impersonator is not
the heir!
book.tr.content.13:
Only shortly after 's
funeral,  crowned
himself as 'Emperor of
Cawr,' claiming he
couldn't replace his
father, so he chose
another title. I've
considered leaving
the capital, Caw, or
even the whole
Kingdom, but I'm more
helpful here!
book.tr.content.14:
The Emperor is a
cruel ruler, so cruel
that I was able to
convince my sister
that he is not actually
her son. She left Cawr
to start a resistance
called '' while I try to
destroy the Emperor's
plans from the inside.
book.tr.content.15:
The Emperor seems to
trust me. He does not
know I'm 's brother. He
found out about  and
is now spreading news
about an organization
that is kidnapping
people - people that
are actually just
joining the resistance.
book.tr.content.16:
The Emperor is
planning to invade the
whole continent using
the old royal fleet.
"Sadly," we can't
afford it since there
does not seem to be
enough crow. Who
could be responsible?
book.tr.content.17:
Cawscaw - the
Emperor's true name,
as he has now
revealed to the High
Council, his "trusted"
advisors like me, is
getting crueler each
day. I need to
proceed with my plans
right now... I need to
find 's hidden
illegitimate son, .
book.tr.content.18:
I'm on a mission to get
a loan so that
Cawscaw can afford
to conquer the
continent, but actually,
I'm looking for .
Supposedly, he is in
Caw, so that's where
I'll start my search.
book.tr.content.19:
I found out where 
lived. He left to find
his "kidnapped" sister,
, however. I assume
she left to join , so I
hope  will be able to
find TE and join as
well. I need to end my
search here and
return to the capital.
book.tr.content.20a:
This is it. Cawscaw has
found a group of TE
members sneaking in
the sewers below the
palace placing
explosives. He
captured them and
executed them on the
spot, but not before
getting their names
and the position of
the TE hideout.
book.tr.content.20b:
and  were in the
sewers with them. The
Crowcaws are dead. At
last, I'm abandoning my
post in the palace, I
need to save my
sister at least!
book.tr.content.21:
I know the TE hideout
is on an island, and
that's where  will be.
When I arrived in Caw,
the whole city was
burning, however. I
won't be able to leave
Cawr with a boat.
Cawscaw sent out a
ship full of killers to
the hideout and then
destroyed the city.
book.tr.content.22:
Cawscaw is crazy. He
is destroying the
entire Kingdom. I
haven't returned to
the palace, but I’ve
still heard that the
mission to destroy TE
has been successful.
I'll go over the Crowia
Crows to start a new
life. There is nothing
left for me here.
book.tr.content.23:
I've arrived in a small
city called Cawford. It
is completely
surrounded by
mountains. I should be
safe here. I will tell
nobody of my past.
Cawscaw seems to be
fine with ruling over a
ruined Cawr so he
shouldn't be any
danger to me anymore.
book.tr.content.24:
I'm enjoying this
peaceful life in
Cawford... My sister
and I should have
never left  Manor, we
should've never went
to Caw. But now
everyone I knew is
dead, my home also
destroyed, and the
kingdom I helped rule:
A ruin.
book.gary.2:
Okay, so it is blatantly
obvious that there is
a crow croow
happening here. It
seems every morning
the entire region
reverts to the state
that it was the
previous day. I have
also located some
potions that seem to
only affect my flow of
time.
book.gary.3:
I think this loop is
more complicated than
I expected. It is winter
now, somehow. I am
unsure what has
happened or how this
occurred, this is
unlike other crow
croows I have
encountered. Also of
note, I think someone
else is aware of these
crow croows.
book.gary.5:
I was observing the
individual that seems
to dictate these loops,
and it seems that
there is a strange
portal to a realm
where time moves much
more quickly than
here. I am still not
sure if they are
aware of the crow
croows, I suppose I
may know in time.

book.ose.content.1:
of Cawr, sitting atop
his throne, stares at
the scene before him.
His guards lie dead on
the ground, enclosing
the throne, and two
determined men
approach him, soon
followed by many
more. , the leader of
the rebellion,
book.ose.content.2:
is clothed in dark
robes, showing a
stark contrast to his
shining emerald eyes,
and their most notable
fighter, , a fierce man
with short black hair.
The Monarch realizes
this is where the 
Dynasty will end. Still,
he stands up and
approaches the men;
book.ose.content.4:
However, that
realization comes far
too late. He was not
expecting a rebellion
back then, and why
should he have? After
all, the  dynasty had
brought a long-lasting
period of prosperity
to the kingdom. Who
could've known 's
reign would be any
different?
book.ose.content.5:
Suddenly, the King
draws his sword and
unexpectedly leaps
forward with
remarkable speed,
attacking , and
causing a bleeding
injury.  slumps to the
ground, clutching his
injured side, a pained
expression visible on
his face. He turns to ,
who has
book.ose.content.7:
rebels staying away
from the fighting for
now. The King starts
advancing, a final time,
and strikes with his
sword. To no avail; His
attack is quickly
blocked by the Rebel.
They are very close
now, and  starts
retreating. Again, the
ruler prepares to
strike once more.
book.ose.content.8:
Then, all of a sudden,
the black-haired man
twirls around the
King's blade in an
attempt to strike the
monarch’s side. The
attempt fails; The
rebel's blade meets
the royal one, and
they quickly become
locked. Without missing
a beat,  uses the
opportunity and
promptly kicks his
book.ose.content.9:
opponent.  drops to
the ground, cursing
his attackers,
however, before he
can get up again, ,
having returned to
the fight, strikes him
through the heart. 
breathes heavily, still
clutching his injured
side, holding his
blood-stained sword.
The battle has
book.ose.content.10:
been won.  is spread
on the ground
lifelessly, staring at
the ceiling with empty,
dead eyes. His crown
lies nearby, having
fallen down from his
head during the
scuffles. The inset
gemstones, four
crows and rubies, still
brightly reflect light,
as if nothing had
happened. The rebels
book.ose.content.11:
are standing around
the fallen body,
celebrating. One of
the intruders walks up
to the crown, picks it
up unceremoniously,
and puts it on ’s head.
The  Dynasty is over,
and at last a new era
has begun. Later, this
will be known as Year
0, the year that marks
the start of a new
book.ose.content.12:
royal family, the reign
of ’s lineage, now
dubbed heart, for the
final blow dealt to the
old ruler. A dynasty,
which leads Cawr into
a period of peace,
one that lasts for
centuries. But in the
end, peace can never
last forever...
